hero.weather.upcoming: Weather based on your estimate. Live forecast for <1>{{city}}</1> unlocks <1>{{date}}</1> — we'll update your plan automatically.
hero.alert.body: Forecast shows {{temp}}°C — {{diff}}° {{direction}} than your estimate. Sodium and fluid targets have been {{change}}. Review and confirm to apply.
hero.fuel.title: Fuel ordered yet?
hero.fuel.gelsPro: ~{{count}} gels based on your plan. Check your full plan for quantities.
hero.fuel.gelsProUnknown: Check your full plan for quantities.
hero.fuel.gelsQuick: ~12 gels based on your quick plan. Upgrade for exact quantities.
hero.upgrade.title: Upgrade to pro plan
hero.upgrade.body: Get sodium & fluid targets, live race-day weather, aid station plan, and gut training schedule — built on what you've already entered.

empty.title: No plans yet

coach.hot: {{name}} is looking hot — {{temp}}°C at race start. Pre-hydrate the morning before. Carry fluid to every aid station, don't skip any. Your carbs stay the same but sodium and fluid are up. Adjust your kit accordingly.
coach.cool: Good news for {{name}} — {{temp}}°C is ideal running weather. Your fluid targets drop slightly. Stick to the plan.
coach.quick.far: Good base plan for {{name}}. For a race this important, upgrading to Pro will dial in your sodium and fluid targets and add weather-aware pacing. Plenty of time to build on this.
coach.quick.near: {{days}} days to {{name}} — solid foundation. Upgrade to Pro for aid station timing and live weather targets.
coach.quick.raceWeek: Race week. Your quick plan gives you carb targets. Pro adds sodium, fluid, and a race-day timeline.
coach.pro.far: {{days}} days to {{name}} — plenty of time. Focus on gut training with your plan targets from week 8 out.
coach.pro.near: {{days}} days out. Weather integration active — we'll update your plan if conditions shift significantly.
coach.pro.raceWeek: Race week for {{name}}. Stick exactly to your plan. No new products, no changes.
